last_episode_to_air.name: The Reunion
last_episode_to_air.overview: Alongside host Tan France, the O Group agents reunite to discuss this season's drama, disputes and difficult truths.

name: Selling Sunset
overview: The elite real estate brokers at The Oppenheim Group sell the luxe life to affluent buyers in LA. The drama ramps up when a new agent joins the team.

episodes.name: If Looks Could Sell
episodes.overview: New agent Chrishell joins The Oppenheim Group and realizes she must prove herself. The brokers square off to sell a spectacular Hollywood Hills home

episodes.name: Can't Have Your Cake and Eat It Too
(Real) Diamonds Are a Girl's Best Friend
It Takes Two to Make a Thing Go Right
Let the Real Estate Games Begin
The Wait Will Be Worth the Wait
That's Why They Call It Real Estress
The Biggest Agent in the Room
Very High Heels to Fill
episodes.overview: An expecting Christine and revived Chrishell eye sexy, luxe properties. A hot market means major growth as disarming new agent Vanessa joins the team.

episodes.name: New Friends, Old Enemies
episodes.overview: Drama looms following a tour of French Montana's opulent digs when Vanessa bonds with Christine and then connects with Chrishell, Heather and Mary.

episodes.name: Rival Arrival
episodes.overview: Jason breaks the news: Emma will fill her rival's sky-high heels. Chrishell fights to buy her first home. Christine talks about a tough childbirth.

episodes.name: The Emma Dilemma
episodes.overview: Another dinner, another dramatic reveal: Emma tells her side of the story. Amid spectacular views, Vanessa tries to get to the truth with Christine.

episodes.name: Let Sleeping Dogs Lie
episodes.overview: Christine flexes for Davina, who reaches out to Jason. After a splashy sale goes south, a familiar face crashes Mary's canine birthday celebration.

episodes.name: A House for a Hero
episodes.overview: Newly minted superhero Simu Liu gets the star treatment as Chrishell's client. Christine and Emma try to clear the air. Davina negotiates a return.

episodes.name: Back on the Market
episodes.overview: Agents bring the heart — and movers, the heat — to the once-homeless Chrishell's housewarming. Amanza reveals her troubles, and a date grows awkward.

episodes.name: The Truth Hurts
episodes.overview: Chrishell takes Simu on a hero's journey through a gamer's retreat. Heather makes a tearful decision. Christine surprises Maya as Amanza gets a shock.

episodes.name: The Beginning of the End
episodes.overview: Open house, open book: Davina faces Christine, who meets Vanessa's mindset coach. Chrishell works with player Thomas Bryant. Mary and Romain clash.

episodes.name: One Last Hail Mary
episodes.overview: Anticipation builds for Jason's lavish bash. Chrishell finds an ideal house for Thomas. Big news drops, but will Christine drop her defenses for Mary?

episodes.name: Game Changer
episodes.overview: Flying high: Chrishell reveals her latest love - Jason. In LA, the agents get real about the relationship while Christine readies her return.

episodes.name: New Blood
episodes.overview: At the office, Chrishell faces J-Shell questions. Chelsea connects with Jason. Christine dishes with Amanza. Emma shocks, and Mary gets big news.

episodes.name: Coming For All Your Coin
episodes.overview: Black and blond Barbies brainstorm. Emma meets a hot developer with a sexy home. Chrishell tries out a dog door. Heather's shower ends with a surprise.

episodes.name: Bad Bitches Don't Cry
episodes.overview: Heather has it out, but can Christine keep it professional? At the caviar and couture party, Chelsea dresses to impress and defends her friend.

episodes.name: Do You Think We're Friends?
episodes.overview: Emma shares a new love with Chrishell. Christine breaks down her event, Amanza reveals an empowering space, and Davina clashes with a client.

episodes.name: Step Up or Step Out
episodes.overview: Hot market, high expectations: Mary ups the pressure and makes a confession to Romain. Chrishell spars with Brett. Davina looks for a last chance.

episodes.name: It's Getting Personal
episodes.overview: Real talk: Chelsea hears from Heather while Davina confronts Christine about her catty quips. Jason's mom grills Chrishell and her son over bites.

episodes.name: She's Your Problem Too
episodes.overview: Musical desks: Chelsea enters blazing, bearing business and invites. Mary makes her move. Chrishell confides in Jason. A tea party gets heated.

episodes.name: Sabotage in Stilettos
episodes.overview: Miami-bound Maya goes out with a bang. Spilt tea leaves Davina unsettled. Chrishell opens up to Heather. A backstabbing rumor shakes Mary.

episodes.name: Nothing Remains The Same
episodes.overview: Hearts flip as Heather weds Tarek. Jason and Mary grapple with being ghosted. Go solo or take the next step: The agents face life-changing decisions.

episodes.name: I Wanted to Hate You
episodes.overview: Chrishell is head-over-heels in love — but is she ready to face the awkwardness at the office? New agent Bre comes in hot, ruffling a few feathers.

episodes.name: TBD on Bre
episodes.overview: While old resentments threaten to create new drama between Chrishell and veteran Oppenheim agent Nicole, Chelsea raises some doubts about Bre.

episodes.name: Old Deals Die Hard
episodes.overview: A smitten Jason introduces the team to his girlfriend, Marie-Lou, and asks Mary for a favor. The claws come out at a Manhattan Beach open house.

episodes.name: Between You and Bre
episodes.overview: After a girls' night out for Heather's birthday, Chelsea shares her unfiltered opinions about Bre's relationship. Mary urges Nicole to make peace.

episodes.name: Miss Management
episodes.overview: Bre shows houses to a celebrity client looking for a fabulous family home, while renovation delays and office squabbling amp up Mary's anxiety levels.

episodes.name: Mary In The Middle
episodes.overview: Jason has a rocky reentry from Europe, prompting Emma to complain to Chrishell. Mary attempts to facilitate peace talks.

episodes.name: If You Can't Stand The Heat...
episodes.overview: Chrishell and Jason catch up before the agents head to Palm Springs for what they hope is a healing retreat — but leaving the drama in LA won't be easy.

episodes.name: Bre Bites Back
episodes.overview: While Elvis superfan Chrishell enjoys a tour of his honeymoon home, Nicole makes a statement. Later, Bre airs out her grievances with Chelsea.

episodes.name: Lawsuits and Listings
episodes.overview: On the agents' last day in Palm Springs, a pool party ceasefire doesn't even last until the end of dinner. Bre tours a listing with rapper Saweetie.

episodes.name: Something's Gotta Give
episodes.overview: Back in LA, Bre opens up to Heather and Amanza shares emotional news with Mary. Heather's baby shower becomes yet another battleground.

episodes.name: It's Not Worth It
episodes.overview: Chelsea shows Emma a new side of herself. At Jason's penthouse launch event, a candid conversation with Mary helps Chrishell come to a realization.

episodes.name: The Real Estate Apocalypse
episodes.overview: Chrishell and Jason return from New Year's Down Under to a chilly LA real estate market. Chelsea goes big for her 30th birthday with a glam masquerade.

episodes.name: Mean Girl Sh*t
episodes.overview: After conflict with the other agents pushes Nicole to a breaking point, Amanza tries to broker a ceasefire. Jason raises a concern with Chrishell.

episodes.name: House of Horrors
episodes.overview: Chrishell counsels comedian Nikki Glaser and meets Marie-Lou for an awkward lunch. An anniversary dinner at an LA architectural landmark turns tense.

episodes.name: Namaste Out of Everyone's Business
episodes.overview: Chelsea attempts to wipe the slate clean with Bre, but Amanza can't escape the mess. Not everyone is on board with Jason's big plans for a new office.

episodes.name: Setting The Stage For Disaster
episodes.overview: New listing assignments cause friction when Brett ruffles Bre's feathers. Jason asks Nicole to prep a house for Chrishell to sell.

episodes.name: It's Not the Size of the Listing...
episodes.overview: While Chelsea gets to work on her new $10 million listing, Amanza hatches a plan to decorate G Flip's studio. Mary gives Nicole some advise.

episodes.name: Cabo San Loco
episodes.overview: The agents fly south to check out the O Group's new location in Cabo, with all their drama along for the ride. Mary and Romain process a painful loss.

episodes.name: Oppenheim Wine
episodes.overview: An encounter at a Cabo open house puts Bre on edge. Mary joins the party. Amanza loses her patience with Chrishell's vanishing act.

episodes.name: The Enemy of My Enemy
episodes.overview: Back in LA, the fallout from Cabo continues. Chelsea and Nicole find common ground with a new friend. Mary and Chrishell reconnect.

episodes.name: Pack it up, pack it in
episodes.overview: Chelsea recommends a potential new agent, raising Bre's eyebrows. While the crew packs up to move offices, Amanza prioritizes self-care.

episodes.name: Commission Impossible
episodes.overview: Bre makes a case for her worth to Jason ahead of a blowout bash for the shiny new Oppenheim office, where old friends and new rivals come face to face.

episodes.name: The Reunion
episodes.overview: Alongside host Tan France, the O Group agents reunite to discuss this season's drama, disputes and difficult truths.
